docs.passage:
[Josh] Quarterly drinks! Last Thursday of the month? I've found a new place in Soho, proper booths 😁
[Mei] I can do 7–9. My team has a big handover that week so I'll need a hard stop.
[Priya] I'm in 🙂 need this
[Leon] just got covered by TechCrunch 🔥 might be able to make it actually. it's been a journey but we're close to profitability. Will confirm closer to the date
[Josh] classic Leon response 😂 we'll have your booth ready in case
[Mei] Near Soho is good. I genuinely have a hard stop though, no heroic late one from me.
[Priya] Same, somewhere easy and not shouty please
[Leon] if I make it I'm ordering champagne and behaving terribly

[Josh] You say that like it's a threat and not the brand
[Leon] exactly. consistency matters
extracted_triples: You say that like it's a threat and not the brand

docs.passage:
[Josh] Good to see you both last night 🍻 Priya you look really well. Mei, your team sounds intense. Leon didn't come again.
[Mei] My team is intense but it's a good problem to have honestly. Leon, what happened?
[Leon] investor call ran over, can't be helped when you're at that stage 🚀 next one for sure
[Priya] We missed you 🙂 it was a good night though
[Josh] Was the investor at least worth missing actual humans for
[Leon] Potentially, yes 😅 brutal timing though
[Mei] You could have texted before 10pm to be fair
[Leon] Fair. I thought I'd make it and then it blew up.

[Priya] Next round is on you then 🙂
[Josh] documented and legally binding
extracted_triples: Next round is on you then 🙂

docs.passage:
[Leon] another round closed! Series A confirmed. journey continues 🚀 what's everyone else up to professionally these days?
[Mei] Congrats Leon. Still building the team, we're at eight now. Just brought in two seniors which changes the dynamic completely.
[Josh] still in the same chair 😂😂 living the dream. Priya you're the one with the interesting job now
[Priya] good question 😂 it's a lot. different kind of hard than expected. anyway, are we doing next quarter?
[Mei] Josh you cannot still call six years at the same place 'same chair'
[Josh] watch me 😂 it's either that or a LinkedIn post and nobody wants that
[Leon] Priya are you private practice now or still split across clinics
[Priya] bit of both. still figuring out what kind of week feels sustainable honestly
extracted_triples: private practice and split across clinics

docs.passage:
[Mei] We should book next quarter now before everyone's calendars become fiction
[Josh] correct. logistics, the true love language
extracted_triples: We should book next quarter now before everyone's calendars become fiction
correct. logistics, the true love language
